text:
I'm 32. Australian. Married with a 4 year old Son. Running a B2B Consulting business.

In 2025 we crossed $4M in total revenue.

I don't have a big following
I don't have a big team
I don't work 24/7

I run a business I love, working with people I genuinely enjoy being around

I was on a call with a guy doing $600k/mo. 

Almost every sentence started like this

'I was reading this book'
'I was listening to this podcast'
'I was on a call with my mentor'

Then he would explain how he was implementing what he learned

And That's why he's at $600k/mo.
